interactionSuite: src/components/scheme/EdgeChips.hover.dom.test.tsx (continuous surface, reserved control box, bounded progressive reveal, repeated progression within viewport bounds, keyboard full-reveal, reduced motion, exact 48- and 60-character titles unfurled through focus + repeated progression + reduced-motion hover, click fit, coarse-pointer removal) + src/components/scheme/offscreenClusters.test.ts (reserves the fully-revealed width in collision geometry; top/bottom chips pinned into a corner fold into «+N» instead of reserving a sub-minimal reveal band; every admitted chip reserves at least the minimum collision-safe width; a chip whose revealed band overlaps the subagent avatar/round stack or the composer/input keep-out folds instead of painting over it)

checks.detail: every fixture title is exactly 48 or 60 characters ([48,60,48,60,48])
the fixture exercises both an exact 48- and an exact 60-character current-work title
the off-screen navigation landmark is pointer-events:none — only its chips take pointer input, never covering chat content (issue #292)
1 «+N» edge disclosure(s) present for 2 off-screen current-work cluster(s)
the edge disclosure shows its folded count "+2"
the disclosure is a collapsed, labelled control (aria-label "Show 2 more off-screen clusters", aria-expanded false)
expanding reveals 2 click-to-fit off-screen conversation button(s)
every off-screen entry carries its WHOLE cleaned title, never a truncation (["Deterministic capture pipeline for stage builder","Off-screen edge navigation with a bounded progressive reveal"])
the disclosure reports aria-expanded=true once opened
panned the board until a single long-titled chip surfaced on an edge, clear of every conversation pane

the surfaced chip carries an exact 48-character current-work title
the direction control sits in its own reserved box before the title — never over the label
the resting pill (width 177px) stays inside the 1440px viewport
the resting chip does not overlap any open conversation pane
repeated pointer progression unfurls further segments (data-reveal steps ["1","2","2","2"])
the progressively-revealed chip stays inside the viewport (right 1418px ≤ 1440px)
keyboard focus sets the title to its full reveal (data-reveal full)
the whole 48-char label "Bounded off-screen edge chip progressive reveals" is visible with no ellipsis — its scrollWidth is contained within the pill once revealed
the fully-revealed pill (width 303px) stays inside the 1440px viewport
the fully-revealed chip still does not overlap any open conversation pane
reduced-motion hover reveals the whole label at once (data-reveal full)
under reduced motion the 48-char label shows in full with its scrollWidth contained inside the pill (no ellipsis)
the reduced-motion reveal stays inside the 1440px viewport
a chip was on the board before the keep-out band was placed (3 chip(s))
a chip whose reveal band overlaps the agent-avatar/round keep-out folds into its «+N» disclosure instead of painting over it
no visible edge chip overlaps the agent-avatar/round stack or the composer/input keep-out surfaces
a real fixture conversation is open in the phone focus view (pane 6–384px)
every edge chip and the off-screen navigation landmark are removed on the 390px shell (chips 0, nav false)
the open conversation pane is horizontally contained inside 390px (left 6px, right 384px)
the conversation content introduces no horizontal overflow and no edge chip overlays it (pane scroll overflow 0px, spill 0px)
